sizing_rule.note: Risk 3% of total equity per trade using fixed fractional sizing. Position size = (equity × 0.03) / (entry_price - stop_loss_price). This ensures consistent risk exposure regardless of account size.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions based on a fixed risk percentage of total equity rather than a fixed contract quantity, because fixed contract sizing ignores account size and creates inconsistent risk exposure across different market conditions.
